ab_test_config.boundary: A/B test spec. NOT feature_flag (toggle) nor experiment_config (ML training).
ab_test_config.description: A/B test experiment configuration for conversion optimization

action_paradigm.boundary: Action execution paradigm. NOT agent_computer_interface (specific protocol) nor cli_tool (CLI wrapper).
action_paradigm.description: How agents execute actions in environments

action_prompt.boundary: Specific task. The LLM EXECUTES this. NOT prompt_template (reusable template) nor system_prompt (identity).
action_prompt.description: Task prompt sent by human/orchestrator to the agent

agent.boundary: Complete agent definition (persona + capabilities). NOT a skill (P04, executable capability) nor system_prompt (P03, how it speaks).

agent_card.boundary: Agent deployment spec. NOT agent (P02, persona only) nor boot_config (P02, provider startup) nor spawn_config (P12, runtime launch).
agent_card.description: Deployment spec for autonomous agent -- identity, model, tools, boot, dispatch, constraints

agent_computer_interface.boundary: Agent-computer interface. NOT browser_tool (web automation) nor computer_use (screen control).

agent_grounding_record.boundary: Per-inference grounding record. NOT trace_config (raw OTel spans) nor model_card (training provenance).
agent_grounding_record.description: Per-inference provenance record: tool calls, RAG chunks, model signature, output hash, OTel/C2PA traceability
agent_grounding_record.upstream_source: OTel GenAI semconv v1.37 + C2PA v2.3

agent_name_service_record.boundary: Agent discovery record (DNS-like). NOT agent_card (capabilities) nor transport_config (protocol only).
agent_name_service_record.description: IETF ANS + CNCF AgentDNS registry record for agent discovery: name, endpoint, PKI cert, protocol adapters

agent_package.boundary: Distributable agent package in ISO format. NOT agent (agent spec) -- agent_package is the portable bundle.
agent_package.description: Portable AI agent package (ISO format) -- self-contained, LLM-agnostic

agent_profile.boundary: Agent persona construction. NOT agent (full agent def) nor system_prompt (how agent speaks).
agent_profile.description: Agent persona and identity construction method

agentic_rag.boundary: Agentic RAG pattern. NOT retriever (simple retrieval) nor agent (agent definition).

agents_md.boundary: AGENTS.md standardized manifest. NOT CLAUDE.md (vendor-specific) nor README.md (human docs) nor .cursorrules (editor-specific).
agents_md.description: AAIF/OpenAI AGENTS.md project-root manifest: setup/test/lint commands, PR format, deploy rules, coding-agent conventions

aggregate_root.boundary: DDD aggregate root. NOT interface (contract definition) nor input_schema (data validation). Evans Aggregate Root.
aggregate_root.description: DDD entry point entity that enforces domain invariants and controls access to its aggregate cluster

ai_rmf_profile.boundary: NIST AI-RMF vertical profile. NOT compliance_framework (broad regulatory mapping) nor threat_model (risk assessment). Structured per AI 600-1 GenAI-profile with action-IDs.
ai_rmf_profile.description: NIST AI RMF profile artifact -- 4 functions (GOVERN/MAP/MEASURE/MANAGE), 13 GenAI risk categories, action-ID mappings per risk. AI 600-1 compliant.

alert_rule.boundary: Monitoring trigger. NOT guardrail (LLM behavior constraint) nor quality_gate (artifact scoring). Industry: Prometheus alerting rule.
alert_rule.description: Observable threshold condition that triggers a notification or automated response

analyst_briefing.boundary: Analyst briefing. NOT pitch_deck (sales) nor case_study (single ref).
analyst_briefing.description: Gartner/Forrester/IDC analyst briefing deck with positioning, proof points, customer wins

api_client.boundary: Typed unidirectional client. NOT db_connector nor mcp_server.

api_reference.boundary: API docs. NOT schema (internal) nor sdk_example (code-only).
api_reference.description: API reference doc with endpoints, params, responses, auth, examples

app_directory_entry.boundary: App directory entry. NOT marketplace_app_manifest (machine spec) nor partner_listing (sales).
app_directory_entry.description: App directory entry for FREE-tier discovery: tagline, screenshots, install steps, demo link

approval_request.boundary: A runtime human-approval REQUEST INSTANCE emitted when a HITL-tagged operation is reached; NOT hitl_config (the approval POLICY/tagging) nor permission (a capability grant).
approval_request.description: Human-approval request instance: gated operation, requester, expiry, approve/deny/timeout status

audio_tool.boundary: Processes audio input/output. NOT vision_tool (visual) nor notifier (message delivery).

audit_log.boundary: Audit log spec. NOT trace_config (observability) nor regression_check (quality).
audit_log.description: Immutable audit log configuration for SOC2 Type II compliance

axiom.boundary: Immutable fundamental rule. NOT law (P08, adjustable operational) nor instruction (P03, flexible).
axiom.description: Immutable foundational principle -- part of the entity's deep identity

backpressure_policy.boundary: Downstream overwhelm handling. NOT rate_limit_config (inbound throttle) nor circuit_breaker (dependency failure). Reactive Streams backpressure.
backpressure_policy.description: Policy defining how a system responds when downstream consumers cannot keep up with upstream producers

batch_config.boundary: API-level async batch job config. NOT a schedule (cron-based) nor a workflow (multi-step). This is a single bulk request.
batch_config.description: Async batch processing config for bulk API operations (OpenAI Batch, Anthropic Batches)

benchmark.boundary: Quantitative performance measurement. NOT eval (does not test correctness) nor scoring_rubric (does not define criteria).

benchmark_suite.boundary: Benchmark suite. NOT benchmark (single benchmark) nor eval_framework (evaluation tooling).
benchmark_suite.description: Composite benchmark definition with multiple tasks

bias_audit.boundary: Fairness evaluation. NOT benchmark (general perf) nor eval_metric (single metric def).

boot_config.boundary: Bootstrap per provider (claude, cursor, codex). NOT env_config (P09, generic variables) nor spawn_config (P12, agent_groups).

bounded_context.boundary: DDD boundary definition. NOT component_map (deployment structure) nor namespace (code boundary). Evans Bounded Context.
bounded_context.description: Explicit boundary within which a domain model applies, with its own vocabulary and rules

brandbook.boundary: Complete brand book -- identity+persona+voice+visual+messaging+do/donts; NOT brand_config (a single platform identity record) nor design_system (tokens only without persona or messaging).
brandbook.description: Complete brand book: identity, color palette, typography, brand persona (voice+tone+copy), logo usage, imagery style, messaging framework, do/donts

browser_tool.boundary: Interacts with web pages via DOM. NOT computer_use (generic screen) nor search_tool (search without navigation).
browser_tool.description: Browser automation: DOM parsing, navigation, interaction, screenshot

bugloop.boundary: Automatic detect>fix>verify cycle. NOT unit_eval (P07, manual test) nor optimizer (continuous improvement, not correction).

c2pa_manifest.boundary: C2PA 2.3 manifest with JUMBF/COSE structure. NOT camera capture manifest, document signing, or W3C VC agent identity.
c2pa_manifest.description: C2PA 2.3 content credential for AI-generated media: claim, assertions, ingredient, signature, AI-ML generator attribution

canary_config.boundary: Canary deployment spec. NOT feature_flag (boolean toggle) nor ab_test_config (experiment split). Industry: Argo Rollouts, Flagger.
canary_config.description: Gradual traffic rollout configuration for safe deployment with automatic rollback triggers

canonical_product.boundary: Channel-neutral golden record = the UNION of every channel's product fields + per-field provenance + conflict flags. NOT marketplace_listing (a per-channel PROJECTION) nor product_ad (the rendered buyer page). One SKU = one record.
canonical_product.description: Channel-neutral product golden record: union of all channel fields (identity codes + numeric specs + typed attributes + prose) with per-field provenance + conflict flags. The single source of truth a tenant PDP renders and every marketplace adapter projects from.

capability_registry.boundary: Discovery catalog. NOT a handoff (P02) or agent card (P08/agent_card). Does not dispatch or execute agents.
capability_registry.description: Searchable catalog of all agents available to crews. Indexes 252 builder sub-agents, nucleus domain agents, and nucleus cards. Fields: capability_name, provider_agent, input/output schemas, cost, quality_baseline, availability. Enables ranked candidate discovery for crew orchestration.

case_study.boundary: Case study. NOT pitch_deck (all-purpose) nor testimonial (quote only).
case_study.description: Customer case study with challenge/solution/outcome/quote narrative

chain.boundary: Sequence of PROMPTS. NOT workflow (P12, agents+tools).
chain.description: Chained prompt sequence (output A -> input B)

changelog.description: Product changelog entry with semver, features, fixes, breaking changes

churn_prevention_playbook.boundary: Churn playbook. NOT renewal_workflow (process) nor expansion_play (upsell).
churn_prevention_playbook.description: Churn prevention playbook: signal detection, intervention triggers, save-the-account scripts

circuit_breaker.boundary: Dependency circuit breaker. NOT fallback_chain (ordered provider fallback) nor rate_limit_config (inbound throttle). Industry: Hystrix, Resilience4j.
circuit_breaker.description: Resilience pattern that auto-disables failing dependencies and allows recovery after a cooldown period

citation.boundary: Source reference with provenance. NOT knowledge_card (the content itself), rag_source (pipeline config), nor glossary_entry (term definition).
citation.description: Structured source attribution with provenance, URL, date, and reliability metadata

cli_tool.boundary: One-shot command-line tool. NOT skill (no phases) nor daemon (does not persist in background).

code_executor.boundary: Isolated environment that executes code. NOT cli_tool (one-shot shell command) nor daemon (persistent process).
code_executor.description: Sandboxed runtime for code execution (Docker, E2B, Jupyter)

code_of_conduct.boundary: Code of conduct. NOT contributor_guide (technical) nor governance (decision rules).
code_of_conduct.description: Community code of conduct (Contributor Covenant pattern) with reporting + enforcement

cohort_analysis.boundary: Cohort analytics. NOT benchmark (model eval) nor usage_report (billing).
cohort_analysis.description: Cohort analysis spec for retention measurement and LTV modeling

collaboration_pattern.boundary: Coordination pattern. NOT workflow (execution sequence) nor handoff_protocol (handoff rules).

competitive_matrix.boundary: Competitive doc. NOT customer_segment (ICP) nor pitch_deck (narrative).
competitive_matrix.description: Competitive feature matrix for sales battle cards and procurement evals

compliance_checklist.boundary: Audit checklist. NOT guardrail (runtime) nor safety_policy (behavior).
compliance_checklist.description: Compliance checklist for SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA, EU AI Act audits

compliance_framework.boundary: Regulatory compliance mapping. NOT safety_policy (org rules) nor threat_model (risk assessment).
compliance_framework.description: Regulatory mapping and attestation for AI systems

component_map.boundary: Structured map of components and connections. NOT diagram (visual) nor agent_card (scope of 1 agent_group).

compression_config.description: Context compression configuration for tool outputs

computer_use.boundary: GUI interaction via automation. NOT browser_tool (DOM) nor cli_tool (command line).
computer_use.description: Screen, keyboard, and mouse control by LLM (Anthropic, browser-use)

conformity_assessment.boundary: Annex IV technical documentation package. NOT compliance_framework (general) nor threat_model (risk only).
conformity_assessment.description: EU AI Act Annex IV conformity assessment for high-risk AI systems (Article 43, Aug-2026 deadline)

consolidation_policy.boundary: Memory lifecycle policy. NOT memory_scope (access rules) nor compression_config (token compression).

constitutional_rule.boundary: Absolute constraint. NOT guardrail (soft constraint with fallback) nor safety_policy (policy document). Anthropic Constitutional AI.
constitutional_rule.description: Absolute behavioral constraint for an agent that cannot be overridden by instructions, context, or operator configuration

content_factory.boundary: Grounded multi-channel content producer: brief -> N per-channel rows -> review -> publish-seam. NOT social_publisher (the publish half only) nor content_monetization (billing pipeline).
content_factory.description: Content production pipeline: PRODUCE (grounded, one brief -> N channel rows) > REVIEW (approved-list HITL gate) > PUBLISH-SEAM (vendor-agnostic, provider deferred)

content_library.boundary: The Gen-2 content store: one row per (post_id, channel, format) with the approval triad + publish lifecycle. NOT social_publisher (the publisher) nor content_factory (the producer). An instance of supabase_data_layer.
content_library.description: Multi-channel content data layer: one row per (post_id, channel, format), approval triad, publish lifecycle, UNIQUE(post_id, channel, format), RLS admin+service

content_filter.boundary: Content filtering pipeline. NOT guardrail (broad safety constraint) nor output_validator (schema check).

content_monetization.boundary: Complete content monetization pipeline: billing, credits, checkout, courses, ads, emails. NOT pricing_strategy (strategy only) nor payment_integration (provider only).

context_doc.boundary: Domain context for hydrating prompts. NOT knowledge_card (no density gate) nor glossary_entry (does not define a term).

context_file.boundary: Project-scoped .md that shapes every agent turn. NOT system_prompt (agent-level) nor knowledge_card (fact storage) nor prompt_template (parameterized).
context_file.description: Project-scoped instruction file auto-injected into context

context_map.boundary: BC relationship map. NOT bounded_context (single BC definition) nor component_map (deployment structure). Evans DDD context mapping.
context_map.description: DDD diagram of relationships and integration patterns between bounded contexts (upstream/downstream, ACL, OHS)

context_window_config.boundary: Budget allocation spec. NOT prompt_template (content), system_prompt (identity), nor model_card (capabilities).
context_window_config.description: Token budget allocation, priority tiers, and overflow rules for prompt assembly

contributor_guide.boundary: Contributor guide. NOT integration_guide (consumer) nor code_of_conduct (norms).
contributor_guide.description: OSS CONTRIBUTING.md spec: dev setup, PR flow, coding standards, review process, CLA

cost_budget.boundary: Money and token economics. NOT a rate_limit_config (requests/sec) nor a token_budget tool (internal). This is the budget POLICY.
cost_budget.description: Token budget allocation, spend tracking, cost alerts per provider/model/nucleus

course_module.boundary: Course content module. NOT a prompt_template nor knowledge_card.
course_module.description: Online course module with learning objectives and assessments

crew_template.boundary: Reusable crew blueprint (roles + process + memory). NOT workflow (P12, generic steps) nor supervisor (P12, crew orchestrator instance) nor handoff (P12, single task transfer). Template does not execute; it instantiates the crew.
crew_template.description: CrewAI/AutoGen-style reusable crew blueprint (roles, process, memory, success)

curation_nudge.boundary: Proactive memory-persistence reminder. NOT guardrail (blocks action) nor quality_gate (pass/fail). Nudges ASK.
curation_nudge.description: Periodic prompt to persist knowledge to durable memory

curriculum_config.boundary: Training data ordering and adaptive pacing. NOT training_method (how to train) nor dataset_card (data documentation) nor finetune_config (full training job).
curriculum_config.description: Training data ordering, difficulty scheduling, and adaptive pacing configuration

customer_segment.boundary: ICP artifact. NOT user_journey (path) nor persona (not-a-kind).
customer_segment.description: Customer segment/ICP definition artifact with firmographics and needs

cybersec_skill.boundary: Cybersec skill distilled from external Apache 2.0 baseline (mukul975 lead) with mandatory source: trace, framework mapping (ATT&CK/CSF/ATLAS/CVE), and capability gating for offensive variants. NOT skill (no source contract), safety_policy (org rules), nor compliance_framework (regulatory). Anti-fabrication via 4 HARD gates (H_AF1-H_AF4).
cybersec_skill.description: Cybersec-domain reusable capability distilled from baseline; source-traced, framework-mapped, capability-gated; 4 anti-fabrication HARD gates enforced at F7 GOVERN

daemon.boundary: Persistent background process. NOT hook (single event) nor cli_tool (one-shot execution that terminates).

dag.boundary: Acyclic dependency graph between tasks. NOT workflow (direct execution) nor component_map (P08, components).

data_contract.boundary: Producer-consumer schema contract. NOT dataset_card (data metadata) nor validation_schema (output validation). DDD Published Language.
data_contract.description: Schema-level agreement between a data producer and consumer defining structure, semantics, and SLA

data_residency.boundary: Residency spec. NOT secret_config (credentials) nor rbac_policy (access).
data_residency.description: Data residency configuration for GDPR and regional compliance

dataset_card.boundary: Dataset documentation. NOT eval_dataset (eval-specific data) nor knowledge_card (general knowledge).

db_connector.boundary: Access to structured data. NOT api_client nor retriever.

deployment_manifest.boundary: Release deployment spec. NOT env_config (runtime environment) nor sandbox_spec (test environment). Industry: Kubernetes manifest, Helm values.
deployment_manifest.description: Specification of what artifacts to deploy, where to deploy them, and how to configure the deployment

design_system.boundary: A selectable, concrete-valued brand visual language -- color/type/space/motion/form tokens + component recipes + usage rules + a CEXAI leverage declaration -- that a design or frontend generator binds to at F3 INJECT. An ACTIVE composable asset, not a passive token dump. NOT brand_config (a single global identity, not a selectable library of many) nor validation_schema (defines the contract SHAPE, not concrete values) nor pattern (P08 architecture semantics).
design_system.description: Selectable brand design system: concrete color/type/space/motion/form tokens + four component recipes + usage rules + a CEXAI leverage declaration (which kinds it feeds and how a builder injects it). An active, composable asset a generator binds to.

diagram.boundary: Visual architecture diagram. NOT component_map (structured data) nor pattern (no prescription).

diff_strategy.boundary: Diff matching strategy. NOT edit_format (format spec) nor parser (generic parsing).

discovery_questions.boundary: Discovery qs. NOT sales_playbook (broad) nor customer_segment (ICP).
discovery_questions.description: MEDDIC/BANT discovery question bank per buyer persona and deal stage

dispatch_rule.boundary: Dispatch rule keyword>agent_group. NOT router (P02, task>model routing) nor workflow (does not execute, only routes).

distillation_config.boundary: Teacher-student knowledge transfer and model compression. NOT finetune_config (full model training) nor quantization_config (weight precision reduction) nor model_card (model documentation).
distillation_config.description: Teacher-student model compression and knowledge distillation setup

document_loader.boundary: Transforms raw files into chunked documents. NOT retriever (search over chunks) nor search_tool (external search).
document_loader.description: Ingere arquivos e converte em chunks (PDF, HTML, CSV, etc)

domain_event.boundary: Domain-level event. NOT signal (system-level) nor audit_log (compliance record). DDD Domain Event.
domain_event.description: Immutable record of something significant that happened in the domain, distinct from system-level signals

domain_vocabulary.boundary: Controlled vocabulary for one domain. NOT glossary_entry (single term) nor ontology (formal relations). DDD Ubiquitous Language registry.
domain_vocabulary.description: Governed registry of canonical terms for a bounded context, enforcing Ubiquitous Language across agents

drift_detector.boundary: Distribution shift monitor. NOT regression_check (code regression) nor benchmark (point-in-time score). Industry: Evidently AI, Arize.
drift_detector.description: Monitor that detects distribution shift in model inputs, outputs, or behavioral patterns over time

dual_loop_architecture.boundary: Dual-loop control. NOT workflow (linear flow) nor collaboration_pattern (multi-agent topology).

e2e_eval.boundary: End-to-end test of complete pipeline. NOT unit_eval (isolated scope) nor benchmark (does not measure performance).

ecommerce_vertical.boundary: eCommerce vertical KC. NOT fintech_vertical (payments-only) nor case_study (ref).
ecommerce_vertical.description: eCommerce industry vertical: cart/checkout, PCI-DSS, recommendation engines, fraud, use cases

edit_format.boundary: Edit format spec. NOT diff_strategy (matching algo) nor formatter (output formatting).

edtech_vertical.boundary: EdTech vertical KC. NOT course_module (course content) nor compliance_checklist (audit).
edtech_vertical.description: Education/EdTech industry vertical: FERPA, COPPA, LMS integration (LTI), student data privacy, use cases

effort_profile.boundary: effort_profile = WHICH model/thinking to use; runtime_rule = WHEN/HOW to execute.
effort_profile.description: Effort and thinking level configuration for builder execution

embedder_provider.description: Text embedding provider for vector search

embedding_config.boundary: Embedding model configuration. NOT knowledge_index (P10) which configures the index -- only the vector model.

enterprise_sla.boundary: SLA contract. NOT quality_gate (runtime) nor compliance_checklist (audit).
enterprise_sla.description: Enterprise SLA template with uptime, latency, support commitments

env_config.boundary: System environment variables. NOT boot_config (P02, per-provider) nor feature_flag (logical on/off).

episodic_memory.boundary: Episode-indexed long-term memory. NOT entity_memory (entity facts) nor memory_summary (compressed context). Cognitive: Tulving 1972.
episodic_memory.description: Long-term store of past interactions indexed by episode for retrieval and context injection

eval_framework.boundary: Eval framework. NOT benchmark_suite (benchmark collection) nor eval_metric (single metric).

eval_metric.boundary: Single metric def. NOT benchmark_suite (composite) nor scoring_rubric (qualitative rubric).

event_schema.boundary: Event payload schema. NOT data_contract (producer-consumer SLA) nor event_stream (infrastructure config). CloudEvents 1.0 / AsyncAPI 3.0.
event_schema.description: AsyncAPI / CloudEvents schema for event payloads defining structure, versioning, and routing metadata

event_stream.boundary: Real-time event stream config. NOT webhook (single outbound call) nor signal (internal nucleus signal). Industry: Kafka topic, Kinesis stream.
event_stream.description: Configuration for a real-time ordered sequence of domain events consumed by one or more subscribers

expansion_play.boundary: Expansion play. NOT churn_prevention_playbook (defensive) nor sales_playbook (new logo).
expansion_play.description: Account expansion play: upsell triggers, cross-sell map, NRR mechanics, AE talk track

experiment_config.boundary: Experiment config with variants and metrics. NOT a feature_flag (boolean toggle) nor a benchmark (one-time evaluation).
experiment_config.description: A/B test and prompt experiment configuration with variants, metrics, and statistical analysis

experiment_tracker.boundary: Experiment tracking. NOT benchmark (evaluation suite) nor experiment_config (single experiment settings).

fallback_chain.boundary: Fallback sequence between LLM models. NOT chain (P03, prompt sequence) nor router (task routing).

faq_entry.boundary: FAQ entry. NOT knowledge_card (broader) nor support_macro (agent canned reply).
faq_entry.description: FAQ entry with question, canonical answer, related links, support deflection metric

fabrication_manifest.boundary: The recipe for ONE tenant fabrication (bootstrap orchestrator). REFERENCES a brand_config (does NOT duplicate it) + the chosen capabilities + the 3 layer targets + per-stage status. NOT team_charter (a crew mission contract), NOT deployment_manifest (what/where to deploy), NOT white_label_config (the branding spec it points at).
fabrication_manifest.description: Per-tenant fabrication recipe: {tenant_id, brand_config_ref, chosen_capabilities[], targets{brain,site,admin}, hosting_target, status, stage_status{A,B,C,D}}. The single source of truth for one bootstrap-orchestrator run (stages A INGEST / B PROVISION / C FABRICATE / D WIRE); idempotent + resumable via stage_status. R-373 (2026-07-14): a second, actively-growing variant of this kind name -- the /genesis S5 run-record (schema cex.fabrication_manifest_run/1, typed .md+frontmatter under N07_admin/P12_orchestration/fabrications/, emitted by cex_fabricate.py) -- is canonical for NEW instances going forward; this description still covers the legacy, gitignored per-tenant state-file shape (schema cex.fabrication_manifest/1), which is grandfathered, not invalid. See kc_fabrication_manifest.md and _docs/specs/SPEC_R373_FABRICATION_MANIFEST_SHAPES_2026_07_14.md for the full reconciliation.

feature_flag.boundary: Feature flag on/off with gradual rollout. NOT permission (access) nor env_config (generic variable).

few_shot_example.boundary: Input/output pair for few-shot learning. NOT golden_test (P07) which evaluates quality -- only exemplifies format.

fhir_agent_capability.boundary: FHIR-native agent capability. NOT general agent (agent_card) nor OAuth2 app (oauth_app_config) nor FHIR workflow (workflow).
fhir_agent_capability.description: HL7 FHIR R5 AI agent capability declaration: SMART on FHIR scopes, PHI handling, CDS Hooks, AI Transparency extension
fhir_agent_capability.spec_version: HL7 AI Office WG 2026 / FHIR R5

field_manifest.boundary: Declarative product-editor description (sections + typed fields) from which the zod schema + publish-gate + rendered form are ALL derived (no drift). NOT input_schema (single data-validation schema, no UI/gate derivation) nor interface (integration contract) nor type_def (single type). ISO = FieldDef/SectionDef/ProductManifest.
field_manifest.description: Schema-to-form manifest: one declarative field_manifest derives the validation schema, the publish-gate, and the rendered editor; app-logic stays pluggable via a handler registry

finetune_config.boundary: Training config. NOT a model_provider (runtime routing) nor a model_card (documentation). This defines HOW to train/adapt a model.
finetune_config.description: Fine-tuning job configuration: dataset, base model, adapter type (LoRA/PEFT), hyperparameters, eval metrics

fintech_vertical.boundary: Fintech vertical KC. NOT compliance_checklist (audit) nor case_study (ref).
fintech_vertical.description: Fintech industry vertical: SOC2+PCI-DSS, KYC/AML, fraud detection, use cases

formatter.boundary: Output format transformer. NOT parser (does not extract data) nor response_format (does not define what the LLM sees).

function_def.boundary: JSON schema of a function the LLM can call via tool_use. NOT mcp_server (full protocol) nor api_client (client implementation).

github_issue_template.boundary: Issue template. NOT pull_request_template (separate) nor faq_entry (answers).
github_issue_template.description: GitHub issue template (bug/feature/question) with required fields and labels

glossary_entry.boundary: Short domain term definition. NOT knowledge_card (no minimum density) nor context_doc (no scope).

golden_test.boundary: Reference test case quality 9.5+. NOT few_shot_example (P01, exemplifies) nor unit_eval (any quality).

govtech_vertical.boundary: Govtech vertical KC. NOT compliance_checklist (audit) nor legal_vertical (private).
govtech_vertical.description: Government/govtech industry vertical: FedRAMP, FISMA, GSA, CJIS, accessibility (Section 508), use cases

gpai_technical_doc.boundary: GPAI provider technical documentation per EU-AI-Act Article-53 and Annex-IV. NOT compliance_framework (policy mapping) nor conformity_assessment (high-risk system). Specific to GPAI models submitted to EU AI Office.
gpai_technical_doc.description: EU AI Act GPAI technical documentation (Annex IV / Article 53) -- training-data summary, compute-budget, energy consumption, evaluation results, intended purpose, downstream-limit.
gpai_technical_doc.upstream_source: EU AI Act Article 53 + Annex IV (Aug 2025 active)

graph_rag_config.boundary: Graph RAG config. NOT knowledge_graph (graph instance) nor rag_source (document source).

guardrail.boundary: Security and safety boundary constraint. NOT permission (P09, access) nor law (P08, operational).

handoff.boundary: Handoff instruction with task+context+commit. NOT action_prompt (P03, pure prompt) nor signal (simple event).

healthcare_vertical.boundary: Healthcare vertical KC. NOT compliance_checklist (audit) nor case_study (ref).
healthcare_vertical.description: Healthcare industry vertical: HIPAA, HL7/FHIR, PHI handling, use cases

hibernation_policy.boundary: Idle-state cost guard for serverless backends. NOT cost_budget (spend caps) nor rate_limit_config (throughput).
hibernation_policy.description: Policy for hibernating idle serverless workloads to save cost

hitl_config.boundary: Requires HUMAN judgment. NOT a guardrail (automated block) nor a quality_gate (automated scoring). This pauses for human review.
hitl_config.description: Human-in-the-loop approval flow configuration: review triggers, escalation chains, timeout actions

hook.boundary: Executable code on pre/post event. NOT lifecycle_rule (P11, declarative rule) nor daemon (persistent process).

hook_config.boundary: hook_config = DECLARACAO de quais hooks; hook = IMPLEMENTACAO do hook
hook_config.description: Hook lifecycle configuration for builder execution

incident_report.boundary: Incident post-mortem. NOT bugloop (auto-fix) nor learning_record (generic learning).

inference_config.boundary: Inference-time generation parameters. NOT model_provider (which model to call) nor thinking_config (extended reasoning budget) nor streaming_config (transport streaming).
inference_config.description: Inference-time parameters: temperature, top_p, sampling strategy, stop sequences, penalties

input_schema.boundary: Input contract defining required data. NOT validation_schema (output) nor type_def (abstract definition).

instruction.description: Step-by-step execution instructions for agents or pipelines

integration_guide.boundary: Integration guide. NOT quickstart_guide (5min) nor api_reference (schema).
integration_guide.description: Deep integration guide for platform partners and paid-tier onboarding

interactive_demo.boundary: Demo script. NOT playground_config (env) nor product_tour (in-app).
interactive_demo.description: Interactive product demo script with guided-tour steps and talk track

interface.boundary: Bilateral integration contract between agents. NOT input_schema (unilateral) nor signal (P12, simple event).

invariant.boundary: Inviolable operational law of the system. NOT instruction (P03, flexible) nor guardrail (P11, safety-focused).

judge_config.boundary: Judge config. NOT llm_judge (judge instance) nor scoring_rubric (human rubric).
judge_config.description: LLM judge configuration for automated evaluation

kind_manifest.boundary: Documents a registered KIND's own identity (purpose, schema, builder pointer) -- one manifest per kind, scaffolded under N00_genesis/P0X_*/kind_{kind}/. NOT knowledge_card (a topic/fact card about the world), NOT output_template (a kind-builder's F6 PRODUCE artifact shape), NOT nucleus_def (documents a NUCLEUS, not a kind).
kind_manifest.description: Canonical per-kind manifest: purpose, schema (key fields), and builder pointer for ONE registered kind in the taxonomy (id: n00_{kind}_manifest)

knowledge_card.boundary: Distilled, static, versioned knowledge. NOT an instruction, template, or configuration.

knowledge_graph.boundary: Relational knowledge structure. NOT an entity_memory (single entity recall) nor a knowledge_index (flat search). This defines RELATIONSHIPS between entities.
knowledge_graph.description: Graph-based knowledge schema with entity types, relation types, and traversal strategies for GraphRAG

knowledge_index.boundary: Semantic search index (BM25, FAISS). NOT embedding_config (P01, model) nor rag_source (P01, source).

kubernetes_ai_requirement.boundary: KAR conformance artifact. NOT env_config (runtime) nor sandbox_config (isolation) nor compliance_framework (regulatory).
kubernetes_ai_requirement.description: CNCF Kubernetes AI Requirement (KAR) conformance artifact: GPU topology, InfiniBand, MIG, DRA, checkpoint PVCs, multi-node training

landing_page.description: Complete production-ready landing page with 12 sections, responsive, dark mode, SEO

learning_record.boundary: Persistent learning record. NOT session_state (ephemeral) nor axiom (immutable, does not learn).

legal_vertical.boundary: Legal vertical KC. NOT compliance_checklist (audit) nor case_study (ref).
legal_vertical.description: Legal industry vertical: privilege, billable hour, contract analysis, use cases

lens.boundary: Specialized perspective on a domain. NOT agent (no capabilities) nor mental_model (no routing rules).

lifecycle_rule.boundary: Declarative lifecycle rule. NOT hook (P04, executable code) nor runtime_rule (P09, technical).

lineage_record.boundary: Knowledge provenance. NOT audit_log (compliance event log) nor citation (source reference). Maps to PROV-O standard.
lineage_record.description: Provenance chain documenting how a knowledge artifact was derived, transformed, and curated

llm_evaluation_scenario.boundary: Single eval scenario. NOT benchmark (suite) nor eval_metric (measure). Bridges eval_dataset + benchmark.
llm_evaluation_scenario.description: HELM Stanford CRFM evaluation scenario: task instances, metric mapping, adapter config, few-shot pool, canonicalization

marketplace_app_manifest.boundary: Marketplace manifest. NOT plugin (loadable) nor app_directory_entry (descriptive).
marketplace_app_manifest.description: Marketplace app manifest spec for Claude/LangChain/HuggingFace listings (metadata, perms, pricing)

marketplace_listing.boundary: Per-channel PROJECTION of a canonical_product (the output of ChannelAdapter.map). NOT canonical_product (the channel-neutral superset) nor partner_listing (a directory entry). Carries channel-specific payload + _meta + a readiness verdict.
marketplace_listing.description: Per-channel listing projection of a canonical_product: the mapped channel payload (e.g. Mercado Livre Items API body) + readiness report (PUBLISH-READY/NOT-READY + missing[]/warnings[]). map/validate are pure; publish is deferred + operator-gated.

mcp_app_extension.boundary: MCP Apps Extension app. NOT mcp_server (protocol base) nor browser_tool (Playwright) nor webhook (callback).
mcp_app_extension.description: MCP Apps Extension (SEP-1865): app manifest, install/launch/terminate lifecycle, capabilities, permission grants, sandboxed iframe

mcp_server.boundary: MCP server exposing tools and resources. NOT connector (simple integration) nor client (API consumer).

memory_architecture.boundary: Memory system design. NOT memory_type (single type) nor memory_scope (access scope).

memory_benchmark.boundary: Memory eval suite. NOT benchmark_suite (general benchmarks) nor memory_architecture (system design).

memory_scope.boundary: Which memory to use. NOT session_state.

memory_type.boundary: Classification and policy for memory types. NOT entity_memory (memory instance) nor memory_scope (who accesses) nor memory_summary (summary).
memory_type.description: Classification of persistent memory by source, confidence, and decay rate

mental_model.boundary: Fixed agent identity with routing and decisions. NOT runtime_state P10 (variable state per session).

messaging_gateway.boundary: Multi-platform message transport (TG/Discord/Slack/WhatsApp/Signal/Email). NOT webhook (single-event) nor api_client (outbound only).

model_architecture.boundary: Architecture definition. NOT model_card (deployment spec) nor model_provider (API integration).

model_card.boundary: LLM spec (pricing, context window, capabilities). NOT agent (P02, who uses the model) nor boot_config (how it starts).
model_card.description: LLM spec in use (pricing, context, capabilities)

model_provider.description: LLM provider adapter (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Ollama, OpenRouter, LiteLLM)

model_registry.boundary: Model registry. NOT model_card (single model spec) nor checkpoint (training snapshot).

motion_scene.boundary: A declarative, programmatic-motion artifact -- render target + elements + keyframes + timeline + easing + transitions + export -- that a renderer compiles to MP4 via an ffmpeg-native pipeline. An ACTIVE composable asset that binds exactly one design_system for palette/type/motion tokens at F3 INJECT. NOT a pipeline_template (orchestration process) nor cli_tool (the renderer itself) nor validation_schema (the contract shape, not the authored scene).
motion_scene.description: Declarative motion scene: render target + elements[] + keyframes[] + easing + transitions[] + export config + a CEXAI leverage block binding a design_system. Compiles to MP4 via ffmpeg-native renderer. Four canonical primitives: lower_third, title_card, counter, scene_transition.

multi_modal_config.boundary: Modality config. NOT vision_tool (visual analysis), audio_tool (processes audio), nor model_card (capabilities).
multi_modal_config.description: Input format, resolution, encoding, and routing rules for multi-modal LLM interactions

multimodal_prompt.boundary: Multimodal prompt. NOT prompt_technique (text-only) nor multi_modal_config (model settings).

naming_rule.boundary: Artifact naming convention rule. NOT validator (P06, validates content) nor type_def (P06, defines type).

notifier.boundary: Sends notification to user/system. NOT webhook (bidirectional event) nor api_client (full integration).
notifier.description: Push notification delivery (email, SMS, Slack, Discord)

nps_survey.boundary: NPS survey. NOT customer_segment (target def) nor cohort_analysis (retention).
nps_survey.description: NPS survey config: question, scale, follow-up, segmentation, cadence, response routing

nucleus_def.boundary: Nucleus contract. NOT agent (individual agent in N0x/agents/) nor model_provider (LLM provider config) nor boot_config (boot runtime).
nucleus_def.description: Formal definition of a CEX nucleus (N00-N07). Fields: nucleus_id, role, pillars_owned, sin_lens, cli_binding, model_tier, boot_script, agent_card_path, crew_templates_exposed, domain_agents. Makes the fractal explicit.

oauth_app_config.boundary: OAuth config. NOT sso_config (workforce) nor secret_config (raw creds).
oauth_app_config.description: OAuth2/PKCE app config for partner integrations: scopes, redirects, token lifetimes, refresh policy

onboarding_flow.boundary: Activation flow. NOT user_journey (full path) nor workflow (system execution).
onboarding_flow.description: User onboarding flow with activation milestones and aha-moment design

ontology.boundary: Formal classification structure. NOT a knowledge_graph (entity relations) nor a glossary_entry (single term). This defines the CLASSIFICATION SYSTEM itself.
ontology.description: Formal taxonomy and ontology definitions (OWL, SKOS, schema.org patterns) for knowledge organization

openapi_spec.boundary: Machine-readable API contract. NOT api_reference (human-readable docs) nor api_client (SDK implementation). OpenAPI Initiative OAS 3.x.
openapi_spec.description: Machine-readable API contract following OpenAPI Specification 3.x defining paths, schemas, and security

optimizer.boundary: Process optimizer metric>action. NOT bugloop (one-off correction) nor benchmark (P07, passive measurement).

opportunity_matrix.boundary: Scored supplier-cost x market-demand join for buy/sourcing decisions (inbound twin of marketplace listing). NOT competitive_matrix (competitor feature battle card) nor roi_calculator (single-row margin math).
opportunity_matrix.description: Scored/ranked join of supplier-cost vs market-demand for buy/sourcing decisions

output_template.boundary: The kind-builder's F6 PRODUCE template -- the exact frontmatter+body shape (with {{vars}}) of the ARTIFACT a kind-builder emits, one per kind (bld_output_{{kind}}.md, ISO #9 of the 12-file builder set). NOT prompt_template (P03, a template for an LLM-facing PROMPT, not the target artifact) nor response_format (P05, an abstract CONSTRAIN-time spec of how the agent's live response is structured) nor formatter (P05, a GOVERN-time runtime transform of already-produced content, not an authored content template).
output_template.description: Builder ISO template (with {{vars}}) defining the shape of a kind-builder's F6 PRODUCE output artifact

parser.boundary: Raw output data extractor. NOT formatter (does not transform format) nor validator (P06, does not validate).

partner_listing.boundary: Partner listing. NOT case_study (customer ref) nor app_directory_entry (app marketplace).
partner_listing.description: Partner directory listing for SI/reseller channels with tier, region, certifications, contact

path_config.boundary: File system paths. NOT env_config (generic variables) nor permission (access control).

pattern.boundary: Reusable architecture pattern. NOT law (inviolable) nor workflow (P12, executable sequence).

permission.boundary: Access permission rule. NOT guardrail (P11, safety boundary) nor feature_flag (feature on/off).

personality.boundary: Hot-swappable persona (voice/tone/values). NOT agent (full spec) nor agent_profile (runtime config).
personality.description: Hot-swap persona applied to an agent at runtime

pipeline_template.boundary: Scenario-indexed agent sequence. NOT crew_template (fixed roles) nor workflow (DAG). Pipelines have sequence + revision loops.
pipeline_template.description: Scenario-indexed agent pipeline recipe (new-feature, bug-fix, refactor, perf, infra)

pitch_deck.boundary: Pitch deck. NOT case_study (narrative) nor pricing_page (tier detail).
pitch_deck.description: Sales pitch deck with problem/solution/traction/ask slide structure

planning_strategy.boundary: Planning approach. NOT reasoning_strategy (prompt reasoning) nor workflow (execution flow).

playground_config.boundary: Playground spec. NOT sandbox_spec (isolation) nor interactive_demo (UI).
playground_config.description: Playground/sandbox config for interactive product evaluation

plugin.boundary: Pluggable system extension. NOT hook (specific event) nor skill (no structured phases).

preference_dataset.boundary: RLHF preference data. NOT eval_dataset (evaluation examples) nor golden_test (expected outputs). Industry: RLHF reward modeling.
preference_dataset.description: Curated dataset of human-labeled preference pairs used for RLHF training or direct preference optimization

press_release.boundary: Press release. NOT blog_post (long-form) nor pitch_deck (visual).
press_release.description: Press release with AP-style headline, dateline, lede, quotes, boilerplate, contacts

pricing_page.boundary: Pricing page UI. NOT subscription_tier (data) nor landing_page (top-of-funnel).
pricing_page.description: Pricing page artifact with tier comparison and conversion copy

procedural_memory.boundary: Procedural memory. NOT entity_memory (entity facts) nor knowledge_card (declarative knowledge).

process_manager.boundary: Event-driven process coordinator. NOT workflow (step-sequential) nor supervisor (agent hierarchy). Enterprise Integration Patterns: Process Manager.
process_manager.description: Event-driven coordinator for multi-step processes that routes domain events and issues commands to participants

product_match.boundary: Visual product matching / record-linkage by non-key join (photo+dimension+supplier-code; EAN excluded); doubles as a catalog auditor. NOT vision_tool (the raw primitive) nor competitive_matrix (competitor doc).
product_match.description: Visual product matching / record-linkage that doubles as a catalog auditor (EAN-free join key)

product_tour.boundary: Product tour. NOT interactive_demo (sales) nor onboarding_flow (activation).
product_tour.description: In-app product tour walkthrough with step/tooltip/trigger spec

prompt_cache.boundary: Cache config. NOT session_state (ephemeral context), memory_summary (history), nor runtime_state (runtime variables).
prompt_cache.description: TTL, eviction, and invalidation config for cached LLM prompt/completion pairs

prompt_compiler.boundary: Transmutation rules and mappings. NOT a router (routes between providers), NOT a dispatch_rule (routes tasks to agents), NOT a prompt_template (template with vars). This IS the layer that resolves WHAT the user wants before any routing happens.
prompt_compiler.description: Intent-to-artifact transmutation rules. Compiles vague user input into structured {kind, pillar, nucleus, verb} resolution. The behavioral seed that makes any LLM operating CEX a prompt compiler (DSPy term).

prompt_optimizer.boundary: Prompt optimizer. NOT prompt_compiler (CEX internal) nor optimizer (general optimization).
prompt_optimizer.description: Automated prompt improvement and compilation tool

prompt_package.boundary: Pre-compiled F1-F4 context package for Mode B generation. NOT prompt_template (reusable template) nor prompt_compiler (intent resolution). This IS the Stage 1 output consumed by cheap models in decomposed 8F.
prompt_package.description: Pre-compiled prompt package containing F1 constraints, F2 builder identity, F3 injected context, and F4 reasoning plan. Consumed by f6_generation tier models that only execute F6 PRODUCE.

prompt_technique.boundary: Prompt technique. NOT prompt_template (reusable template) nor reasoning_strategy (reasoning-specific).

prompt_template.boundary: Template with variables. NOT user_prompt (fixed) nor system_prompt (identity).
prompt_template.description: Reusable template with {{vars}} to generate prompts

prosody_config.boundary: Prosody/emotion settings. NOT tts_provider (provider integration) nor agent_profile (agent persona).

prospective_memory.boundary: Future-action memory. NOT schedule (workflow schedule config) nor session_state (current session). Cognitive: prospective memory.
prospective_memory.description: Scheduled future actions and reminders that an agent must execute at a future time or trigger condition

quality_gate.boundary: Quality barrier with numeric score. NOT validator (P06, technical pass/fail) nor scoring_rubric (P07, defines criteria).

quantization_config.boundary: Quantization settings. NOT compression_config (context compression) nor model_architecture (full arch).

query_optimizer.boundary: Query transformation and decomposition rules for RAG retrieval. NOT search_strategy (which strategy to use) nor retriever_config (retrieval parameters) nor rag_source (data source definition).
query_optimizer.description: Query rewriting, expansion, and multi-hop decomposition rules for RAG retrieval

quickstart_guide.boundary: Quickstart doc. NOT integration_guide (deep) nor sdk_example (code-only).
quickstart_guide.description: Quickstart guide artifact for product/API onboarding in under 5 minutes

rag_source.boundary: Pointer to external indexable source. NOT the content itself -- only a reference with URL and freshness.

rbac_policy.boundary: RBAC spec. NOT permission (capability) nor sso_config (identity).
rbac_policy.description: Role-based access control policy for multi-tenant isolation

realtime_session.boundary: Realtime session config. NOT transport_config (network layer) nor voice_pipeline (full architecture).

reasoning_strategy.boundary: Reasoning technique. NOT prompt_technique (generic prompt pattern) nor thinking_config (budget settings).

reasoning_trace.description: Structured chain-of-thought reasoning with confidence scores

referral_program.boundary: Referral spec. NOT ab_test_config (experiment) nor content_monetization (pricing).
referral_program.description: Referral program design with viral coefficient and reward structure

renewal_workflow.boundary: Renewal workflow. NOT churn_prevention_playbook (intervention) nor workflow (generic).
renewal_workflow.description: Renewal workflow with stages, owners, automation, escalation, contract amendments

repo_map.boundary: Repo context map. NOT component_map (system architecture) nor knowledge_index (search index).

reranker_config.boundary: Reranker config. NOT retriever_config (first-stage retrieval) nor retriever (retrieval logic).
reranker_config.description: Retrieval reranking model and strategy config

research_pipeline.boundary: Multi-source research pipeline STORM+CRAG+CRITIC. NOT retriever (local search) nor search_tool (simple web search).

response_format.boundary: Response format injected into the LLM prompt. NOT validation_schema P06 (post-generation contract enforced by the system).
response_format.description: LLM response format (how the agent responds)

retrieval_evaluator.boundary: IR-specific retrieval quality evaluation suite. NOT eval_metric (single generic metric) nor benchmark (broad model evaluation) nor retriever_config (retrieval parameters).
retrieval_evaluator.description: RAG-specific information retrieval evaluation metrics (MRR, NDCG, precision@k, recall@k)

retriever.boundary: Search over embedding store or local index. NOT search_tool (external web search) nor document_loader (ingests files).
retriever.description: Vector/keyword/hybrid search over a local store (RAG core)

retry_policy.boundary: Retry backoff config. NOT circuit_breaker (open/closed state machine) nor rate_limit_config (inbound throttle). AWS SDK Retry / Polly.
retry_policy.description: Backoff, jitter, and budget configuration for retrying failed operations -- separate from circuit breaker

reverse_prompt.boundary: A typed, persisted repo-reconstruction PROMPT artifact synthesized from a public repo (kind:reverse_prompt, open_vars-filled, frozen per ADR 022); NOT prompt_template (the reusable {{var}} template it fills) nor knowledge_card (a factual note).
reverse_prompt.description: Repo-reconstruction prompt synthesized from a public repo: instructions to rebuild an equivalent project, filled with target_audience/target_runtime/complexity_level open_vars

revision_loop_policy.boundary: Max-N revision iterations before escalation. NOT retry_policy (transient failure) nor quality_gate (single check) nor regression_check (diff vs baseline).
revision_loop_policy.description: Policy governing max revision iterations and escalation priority

reward_model.boundary: Reward model config. NOT rl_algorithm (training algo) nor scoring_rubric (human eval rubric).

rl_algorithm.boundary: RL algorithm def. NOT training_method (broader training) nor reward_model (reward function).

roi_calculator.boundary: ROI calc. NOT cost_budget (ops) nor usage_report (actual).
roi_calculator.description: ROI calculator spec with inputs, formulas, TCO comparison for economic buyers

role_assignment.boundary: Binds builder/sub-agent to crew role (CrewAI Agent class). NOT agent (P02, pure identity) nor skill (P04, atomic capability) nor handoff (P12, task transfer). Role binding without execution.
role_assignment.description: CrewAI Agent-style binding: role -> agent + responsibilities + delegation + backstory
role_assignment.upstream_source: CrewAI Agent / AutoGen ConversableAgent / OpenAI Swarm Agent

router.boundary: Task-to-agent_group routing. NOT dispatch_rule (P12, keyword>agent_group) nor fallback_chain (model>model).

runtime_rule.boundary: Technical runtime rule (timeouts, retries). NOT lifecycle_rule (P11, lifecycle) nor law (P08, inviolable).

runtime_state.boundary: Variable mental state accumulated at runtime. NOT mental_model P02 (fixed agent identity, immutable) nor session_state (ephemeral, snapshot).
runtime_state.description: Estado mental variavel por sessao (routing, decisoes em runtime)

safety_hazard_taxonomy.boundary: Formal AI safety hazard classification taxonomy per MLCommons AILuminate v1.0. NOT content_filter (runtime filtering pipeline) nor guardrail (enforcement boundary). Provides taxonomy structure; enforcement is downstream.
safety_hazard_taxonomy.description: MLCommons AILuminate / Llama Guard hazard taxonomy -- 12 hazard-categories (violence/sexual/CBRN/...) + severity-level definitions + response-templates.

safety_policy.boundary: Safety governance rules. NOT threat_model (risk assessment) nor compliance_framework (regulatory mapping).

saga.boundary: Distributed transaction with compensation. NOT workflow (sequential steps) nor process_manager (event coordination). Saga pattern (Garcia-Molina 1987).
saga.description: Long-running distributed transaction composed of local steps with compensating actions for rollback

sales_playbook.boundary: Sales playbook. NOT pitch_deck (deck) nor discovery_questions (subset).
sales_playbook.description: Sales playbook with personas, discovery flow, objection handling, close patterns

sandbox_config.boundary: Sandbox/isolation config. NOT env_config (environment vars) nor code_executor (execution logic).

sandbox_spec.boundary: Sandbox spec. NOT playground_config (interactive) nor env_config (prod).
sandbox_spec.description: Isolated sandbox environment spec for enterprise pilot procurement gates

schedule.description: Temporal trigger that starts a workflow

scoring_rubric.boundary: Evaluation criteria with framework. NOT benchmark (does not measure) nor quality_gate (P11, does not block).

sdk_example.boundary: SDK example. NOT api_reference (schema) nor integration_guide (narrative).
sdk_example.description: SDK code example showing canonical integration patterns per language

search_strategy.boundary: Search/inference strategy. NOT reasoning_strategy (prompt technique) nor retriever (document retrieval).

search_tool.boundary: Searches and returns ranked results. NOT retriever (local vector store) nor document_loader (ingests files).
search_tool.description: Web, semantic, or hybrid search (Tavily, Serper, Perplexity)

self_improvement_loop.boundary: Self-improvement loop. NOT bugloop (bug-specific) nor learning_record (passive learning).

session_state.boundary: Ephemeral session state (snapshot). NOT runtime_state (persistent across sessions) nor learning_record (does not accumulate).

signal.boundary: Simple signal between agents (complete, error). NOT handoff (complete instruction) nor interface (P06, contract).

skill.boundary: Phased reusable capability with trigger. NOT agent (P02, has identity) or workflow (P12, orchestration steps) or action_prompt (P03, single-turn).
skill.description: Reusable capability with trigger + phases (AgentSkills.io / Semantic Kernel pattern)

slo_definition.boundary: Measurable SLO target. NOT enterprise_sla (contractual SLA) nor quality_gate (build-time artifact scoring).
slo_definition.description: Measurable service level objective with target threshold and error budget for a system or agent

smoke_eval.boundary: Quick sanity test in <30s. NOT unit_eval (deep) nor benchmark (continuous metrics).

social_publisher.boundary: Auto-posting pipeline for social networks. NOT notifier (one-off alerts) nor schedule (generic scheduling).

software_project.boundary: Complete project. NOT component_map (P08, partial view) nor agent_package (P02, agent package).
software_project.description: Complete software project definition -- architecture, dependencies, build, deployment, repo structure

spawn_config.boundary: Agent_groups spawn configuration. NOT boot_config (P02, per-provider) nor env_config (P09, variables).

sso_config.boundary: SSO spec. NOT rbac_policy (authorization) nor secret_config (credentials).

state_machine.boundary: Formal FSM. NOT workflow (DAG of steps) nor process_manager (event coordinator). UML statechart / XState.
state_machine.description: Formal finite state machine with states, transitions, guards, and actions governing entity lifecycle

streaming_config.boundary: Transport-level streaming config. NOT a response_format (output structure) nor a rate_limit_config (throughput). This controls HOW output is delivered.
streaming_config.description: SSE, WebSocket, and chunked response streaming configuration for real-time LLM output

stt_provider.boundary: STT provider integration. NOT voice_pipeline (full arch) nor vad_config (detection settings).

subscription_tier.boundary: Pricing tier. NOT content_monetization (strategy) nor pricing_page (UI).
subscription_tier.description: SaaS subscription tier definition with pricing and feature matrix

supabase_data_layer.boundary: Supabase data layer. NOT db_connector (generic connection) nor api_client (REST client).
supabase_data_layer.description: Supabase-specific data layer -- tables, RLS policies, edge functions, storage buckets, auth rules

supervisor.description: Crew orchestrator that composes and coordinates multiple builders

synthetic_data_config.boundary: Synthetic training data generation pipeline. NOT dataset_card (data documentation and metadata) nor eval_dataset (evaluation data specification) nor finetune_config (training job parameters).
synthetic_data_config.description: Synthetic training data generation pipeline configuration

system_prompt.boundary: Identity + rules + format. Read FIRST by the LLM.
system_prompt.description: System prompt that defines agent identity and rules

tagline.description: Short memorable phrase capturing brand essence -- taglines, slogans, headlines

team_charter.boundary: Governance contract only. NOT a handoff (N07 authors those), NOT a crew_template (reusable), NOT a dispatch_rule (routing logic).
team_charter.description: Mission contract for a specific crew instance. Bridges GDP decisions (WHAT) to autonomous crew execution (HOW). Fields: charter_id, crew_template_ref, mission_statement, deliverables, success_metrics, budget, deadline, stakeholders, quality_gate, escalation_protocol, termination_criteria.

tenant_voice_profile.boundary: The brand-voice mold for the grounded copy engine: Block A generic skeleton + Block B grounding contract (G1-G10) + Block C tenant fill. NOT personality (agent persona) nor system_prompt (identity). May touch labels/framing/prose; NEVER ficha values or quantitative claims.
tenant_voice_profile.description: Tenant brand-voice profile for grounded ad-copy: identity/register/lexicon/mechanics + an inherited 10-rule grounding contract (facts-only, OMIT-on-missing). The voice knob a tenant fills; the copy layer loads it.

terminal_backend.boundary: Execution environment abstraction (local/docker/ssh/daytona/modal/singularity). NOT sandbox_config (security isolation).
terminal_backend.description: Abstract execution backend selectable at runtime

thinking_config.boundary: Thinking budget config. NOT reasoning_strategy (technique) nor context_window_config (token limits).
thinking_config.description: Extended thinking and budget token settings

threat_model.boundary: Threat/risk assessment. NOT safety_policy (governance rules) nor guardrail (runtime filter).
threat_model.description: Structured hazard/risk assessment for AI systems

tokenizer_config.boundary: Tokenization vocabulary and encoding rules. NOT embedding_config (vector representation parameters) nor model_provider (which model to call) nor context_window_config (token budget limits).
tokenizer_config.description: BPE, sentencepiece, or tiktoken tokenizer parameters and vocabulary configuration

toolkit.description: Collection of callable tools with auto JSON Schema

training_method.boundary: Training technique. NOT rl_algorithm (RL-specific) nor finetune_config (runtime fine-tune settings).

trajectory_eval.boundary: Trajectory evaluation. NOT benchmark (static eval) nor e2e_eval (end-to-end test).

transport_config.boundary: Transport layer config. NOT realtime_session (session lifecycle) nor streaming_config (LLM streaming).
transport_config.description: Network transport layer for realtime communication

tts_provider.boundary: TTS provider integration. NOT voice_pipeline (full arch) nor prosody_config (voice personality).

type_def.boundary: Custom type definition in the system. NOT input_schema (input contract) nor interface (bilateral contract).

unit_eval.boundary: Unit test of individual agent or prompt. NOT smoke_eval (quick, no depth) nor e2e_eval (complete pipeline).

usage_quota.boundary: Quota spec. NOT rate_limit_config (RPM) nor cost_budget (dollars).
usage_quota.description: Usage quota and fair-use enforcement configuration

usage_report.boundary: Usage analytics spec. NOT cost_budget (limits) nor trace_config (telemetry).
usage_report.description: Usage analytics report spec for billing and CFO dashboards

user_journey.boundary: Journey map. NOT workflow (system) nor onboarding_flow (activation sub-journey).
user_journey.description: End-to-end user journey map from awareness to conversion

user_model.boundary: Cross-session dialectic user representation (Honcho-pattern). NOT entity_memory (any entity) nor session_state (single session).
user_model.description: Cross-session dialectic model of the user -- preferences, working style, context

vad_config.boundary: VAD settings only. NOT voice_pipeline (full arch) nor stt_provider (transcription).

validation_schema.boundary: Formal contract enforced by the SYSTEM after generation. NOT response_format P05 (injected into prompt, LLM sees it).
validation_schema.description: Post-generation validation contract (system applies, LLM does not see)

validator.boundary: Technical pass/fail validation rule. NOT quality_gate (P11, numeric score) nor scoring_rubric (P07, criteria).

value_object.boundary: Immutable value type. NOT type_def (generic type) nor enum_def (enumeration). Evans Value Object.
value_object.description: Immutable typed value without identity, defined entirely by its attributes and equality

vc_credential.boundary: VC 2.0 JSON-LD with data-integrity proof. NOT vc-jose-cose (JWT encoding), DID document, or Verifiable Presentation.
vc_credential.description: W3C Verifiable Credential 2.0 for AI agent identity, provenance attestation, and cross-domain trust

vector_store.description: Vector database backend for similarity search

vision_tool.boundary: Processes visual input and returns structured data. NOT browser_tool (DOM interaction) nor computer_use (screen control).

visual_workflow.boundary: Visual workflow editor. NOT workflow (code-defined) nor dag (directed acyclic graph).

voice_pipeline.boundary: Voice pipeline architecture. NOT tts_provider (single provider) nor stt_provider (single provider).

webhook.boundary: Receives or sends events via HTTP. NOT api_client (request-response) nor notifier (message delivery).

webinar_script.boundary: Webinar script. NOT pitch_deck (visual deck) nor sales_playbook (1:1 selling).
webinar_script.description: Webinar script with intro/agenda/segments/Q&A/CTA + speaker notes + slide cues

white_label_config.boundary: White-label spec. NOT brand_config (identity) nor env_config (runtime).

workflow.boundary: Flow of agents+tools sequential/parallel. NOT chain (P03, prompt sequence) nor dag (dependency graph without execution).

workflow_node.boundary: Workflow node type. NOT workflow (full workflow) nor visual_workflow (GUI editor config).

workflow_primitive.description: Workflow execution primitive (Step, Parallel, Loop, Condition, Router)

workflow_run_crate.boundary: Execution provenance packaging. NOT workflow definition (workflow, P12), raw dataset (dataset_card, P01), or agent identity (vc_credential, P10).
workflow_run_crate.description: RO-Crate 1.2 Workflow Run Crate: scientific workflow execution provenance with CreateAction, ORCID attribution, and FAIR metadata

working_memory.boundary: Task-scoped short-term memory. NOT session_state (session persistence) nor entity_memory (long-term entity store). Cognitive: working memory.
working_memory.description: Short-term context store for a single active task, cleared after task completion
